text.title: spatial-design-tools Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from project phase + platform list to tool stack and asset-format choice.

conclusion.verdict: tools=[figma, shapesxr]; no engine commitment yet
engine=unity (PolySpatial) OR unreal; primary asset=gltf with USDZ secondary
set polygon/file-size/draw-call budgets BEFORE artist work

text.example: phase=prototype → platforms include visionos → engine=unity, format=gltf+usdz; budgets set at concept-stage exit.
